formula_or_method: Taxable income = Total income - Reliefs - Personal allowance
thresholds_rates: PA taper: reduce £1 per £2 ANI above £100,000; PA nil at £125,140 (UK standard, confirm exam table)
examiner_note: For UK exams commonly fixed by tax tables

formula_or_method: Adjusted profit = Accounts profit + disallowables - extra allowables
thresholds_rates: Add back depreciation; deduct capital allowances separately

formula_or_method: Pool closing TWDV = Opening + Additions - Disposals - AIA/FYA - WDA
NIC liability = sum(rate x band slice by class)
thresholds_rates: Use correct class thresholds/rates from table

formula_or_method: Gain = Proceeds - (Cost + Enhancement + Incidental costs) - Reliefs
thresholds_rates: AEA and rates from tax tables
examiner_note: Rate split uses remaining basic rate band

formula_or_method: CT = TTP x relevant CT rate (+/- marginal relief where applicable)
thresholds_rates: Small profits/main limits divided by associated companies
examiner_note: Include FY split if AP spans FY

formula_or_method: Net VAT = Output tax - Recoverable input tax
thresholds_rates: Registration threshold and dereg threshold from table
